arts.ttl: Confirmed Ross County vs Celtic team news as Brendan Rodgers makes 3 changes from Borussia Dortmund drubbing
arts.sum: Get the latest news sent straight to your messages by joining our Celtic WhatsApp community today. Hoops boss Rodgers has already confirmed that the champions are without Cameron Carter-Vickers and Greg Taylor which sees left-back Alex Valle earn his second start.

arts.sum: Just days after destroying the Scottish champions, Dortmund were defeated by Union Berlin

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton puts Robbie Savage's 'easy attack' on Celtic in Europe straight with £600m Man United take
arts.sum: And Sutton told Savage to judge Celtic after the eight games have been concluded and to ‘just imagine’ what Celtic could do in Europe if the Glasgow giants had the spending power of Man United who are struggling in the Europa League. Chris Sutton targets Man United’s spending power to defend Celtic in Europe

arts.ttl: Ross County 0 Celtic 0 LIVE goal updates from the Premiership clash at Dingwall
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers’ side return to domestic action after the doing in Dortmund

arts.ttl: Ross County boss makes an odd Celtic comparison but pinpoints duo who can exploit his side
arts.sum: Cowie said [ Ross-shire Journal ]: “We spoke about it as a group going into these two games – Hearts and Celtic are very similar in terms of the way the opposition plays. Ross County manager Don Cowie has compared league leaders Celtic to bottom side Hearts in the build-up to Sunday’s Scottish Premiership meeting.

arts.ttl: Kevin Gallacher predicts Brendan Rodgers' Sunday Celtic team talk that will worry Ross County
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers has an ‘easy’ message for Celtic vs Ross County Gallacher said [ Sunday Post, 06/10 print edition]: “Celtic have given Brendan Rodgers an easy team talk to make against Ross County.

arts.ttl: Celtic star Daizen Maeda sends pleasing fan-focused media message ahead of Ross County
arts.sum: Daizen Maeda out to make Celtic fans smile vs Ross County Celtic winger Daizen Maeda has been one of the most thrilling players to watch in green and white this season.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers told Celtic defender gets pass marks vs Dortmund despite heavy Champions League defeat
arts.sum: Despite not having many players putting in the same level of performances that the Celtic fans have witnessed domestically and against Slovan Bratislava in matchday one of the Champions League, the Hoops boss has been told that at least one defender gets pass marks for his performance against Borussia Dortmund on Tuesday night. Nuri Sahin’s side took Celtic apart in the Westenfallonstadion on Tuesday night but Andy Walker believes that Liam Scales was the one defender who put in a good performance despite shipping seven goals.
